user.title: Cozify HUB — Connection Settings
user.description: Choose how to connect to your Cozify HUB (ION, ZEN or DIN).

local.title: Local Connection
local.description: Enter the HUB's local IP address and hub token. The HUB uses HTTPS on port 8893.

cloud_email.title: Cloud Login — Email
cloud_email.description: Enter your Cozify account email to receive a one-time login code.

cloud_otp.title: Cloud Login — OTP
cloud_otp.description: A login code has been sent to {email}. Enter it below.

select_hub.title: Select HUB
select_hub.description: Multiple HUBs found. Choose which one to configure.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect. Check IP address and network.
error.hub_offline: HUB is reachable but appears offline.
error.no_hubs: No HUB devices found for this account.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Cozify HUB is already configured.
